commercialRule: On a new laptop, cloud data is normalized after pull, clinic users are linked to the Supabase email, and Orders opens on all active purchase orders by default.
releaseNotes: Fixed first-use false Low stock labels on other laptops by recalculating low stock from real quantity and reorder threshold after cloud pull.
Normalizes pulled product quantity/minimum/ideal values and removes stale copied low-status flags.
Fixes first-use Orders/Supplier Reorder Plan behavior by defaulting Active Purchase Orders to All open orders instead of a narrow Active tab.
Links the signed-in Supabase email to the default/owner clinic user after cloud pull when the cloud user exists but has no email locally.
Runs stabilization on cloud apply, account sync refresh, app focus, online, and first delayed startup checks.
No SQL is run automatically by this patch; Supabase SQL repair 10.2.0B must already be installed.
No local app data, products, suppliers, orders, reports, inventory, or updater logic is deleted.
